reference: I am sorry to hear about your situation. A blockage of forty% is not considered significant. I would like to know about the status of other arteries as well; there might be blockages in other arteries for which surgery is advised. Therefore, without knowing the full coronary angiography report, it is difficult to comment. I would like to inform you that having surgery with heart function at twenty-five% is always a high-risk procedure, including the possibility of death on the operating table.
text: I like to make videos of animals.
